name: Falulu
description: Falulu is a mysterious vocal doll who appears in episode 1 and later makes her debut as an idol in episode 17. At the beginning of the series, she is very naive and doesn't know a lot of words so she tends to repeat the words and actions of others (even copies Laala's and Mirei's catchphrases and actions). Her voice sounds slightly robotic, and she tends to call certain things (like the Prism Voice and Laala) sparkling. Despite not knowing what emotions are, she still expresses anger, fear and h

name: Fenshen
description: Fenshen used to be a high ranking courtesan in Verdigris Hall. With a flinty and hard personality, she was unmatched at strategy board games. She fell in love with a man who could challenge her at those, but was later abandoned after bedding him. ~!Her mental condition degraded heavily and she mistreated her baby to the point the other courtesans took Maomao to raise her themselves. Ultimately she contracted syphilis and got bedridden in a backroom of Verdigris.!~

name: Gaju Akagi
description: He is the brother of Mako and amateur dancer. He is in love with Shizuku. He is currently in high school.

name: Gaku Yoneda
description: Gaku Yoneda is a human who was selected by the angel Muni to be a God candidate. He is the last God candidate to be revealed in the series.

name: Galdino
description: __Devil Fruit:__ Doru Doru no Mi (Wax Wax Fruit) __Devil Fruit Type:__ Paramecia A self proclaimed brilliant strategist, Mr. 3 prides himself that his plans are supposedly flawless, and was ordered to kill the Straw Hat Pirates and decided to claim the bounty on the giants Dorry and Broggy. Mr. 3 ate the Doru Doru no Mi (Wax Wax Fruit in the English), giving him the power to produce molten wax from any part of his body. However, he can't turn himself into wax. He sabotages a sacred battle betwee

name: Giriko
description: Giriko is an enchanter and demon weapon allied with the witch [Arachne Gorgon](https://anilist.co/character/16228/Arachne-Gorgon), and serves as one of Arachnophobia's most powerful members. Manga: ~!After the destruction of Arachnophobia, he allies with [Noah](https://anilist.co/character/16232/Noah) and becomes part of his group in an effort to avenge [Arachne](https://anilist.co/character/16228/Arachne-Gorgon)'s demise.!~ ~!Within the Book of Eibon he badly injures both [Maka](https://anilist

name: Hakuren
description: **Race:** Dragon Hakuren is the older sister of Doraim and Rasuti's aunt. She initially attacks the village upon hearing that her niece, Rasuti , has a boyfriend, but is eventually repelled by Hiraku and decides to settle down in the village.

name: Hannah Anafeloz
nativeName: ハンナ・アナフェローズ
description: Hannah is the maid of the Trancy Household. Hannah is loyal to her master, Alois Trancy, and is quite a mysterious woman. She seems to be quite a worried person, and is often seen with her head tilted down as a way of avoiding eye contact with others. She is quite obviously terrified of Alois, and is calm except for the moments in which he is speaking to her. In these moments, she is brisk, nervous, and will even tremble with fear.
searchTerms: ハンナ・アナフェローズ

name: Hazuki Okamoto
description: An underclassman of Nee-san, Hazuki is one of the members of the Model Club, nicknamed "Okappa" (オカッパ, "bob cut"). She is a classmate of Makimaki and sits next to her in class. She is generally levelheaded and calm but is prone to getting really violent and monstrous when it comes to Nee-san's antics. Still, she is shown to have a gentle and caring side when Makimaki was experiencing a heartbreak. She is weak against insects, especially large cockroaches. She has a model of a train on her head.

name: Hiruhiko
description: Hiruhiko is a member of the Hishaku.

name: Honoka
description: **Height:** 157 cm An employee at Café Latte. She can become somewhat maniacal about getting in character for her job and criticizes Misaki for her initial resistance to acting parts outside of her comfort range, as well as for being ashamed of working at Maid Latte and hiding it from her peers. (Source: Wikipedia)

name: Ibuki Niijima
description: **Position:** Vocals/Performer Ibuki is a member of **[Photon Maiden](https://anilist.co/staff/263434/Photon-Maiden)**. Ibuki loves to move her body and has participated in many sports since childhood. In junior high, she became hooked on the joy of dancing and singing and started to attend a show production school. Never forgetting to care for others, she is a leader in both name and reality. (Source: D4DJ Fandom)

name: Ilya Lindsay
mediaTitles: The Lazy Lord Masters the Sword
searchTerms: The Lazy Lord Masters the Sword

name: Iori Yagami
description: Since the KOF '95 project began with the concept of introducing Iori as Kyo's rival, he became known as a character who was a member of a rival school of martial arts that had a connection to the Ancient Arts of the Kusanagi. He was also given the ability to use a different color of flames other than Kyo's (red flames), along with various other characteristics. When you think of Iori Yagami, his intense personality most likely comes to mind. His moves are unique, and his singular choice of hairs
mediaTitles: THE KING OF FIGHTERS: A NEW BEGINNING
searchTerms: THE KING OF FIGHTERS: A NEW BEGINNING

name: Isidor Bisconti
description: Isidor is a highly skilled swordsman and heir to the Bisconti family, one of the most prestigious ducal families in the Asteia Empire. He is described as one, if not the most handsome man of his time by both women and men. He has complete confidence in himself and his abilities. According to Deborah, he does not appear in the novel she knows. ~!Isidor is the main male protagonist. Besides being a skilled swordsman, he is a great mage and also the master of Blanche, an information guild. He doesn
mediaTitles: The Perks of Being a Villainess
searchTerms: The Perks of Being a Villainess

name: Ji-Han Han
description: Han Jee-Han (한지한, Hanjihan) also known as "The Gamer" is the main protagonist of the manhwa The Gamer. Jee-Han has recently discovered that he has a Natural Ability called The Gamer. This ability makes him experience his life in a game-like setting which was derived from his gaming addiction.

name: Joutarou Aragaki
description: Joutarou Aragaki is a former athlete on the Japanese gymnastics team. He has a daughter, [Rei Aragaki](https://anilist.co/character/184608/). He is a muscular man with brown eyes and light but tanned skin. He has dark brown hair which he typically wears pulled back into a messy ponytail, a feature that’s given him the nickname “Samurai”. Joutarou is a passionate man who tends to push himself past his limits and believes that he can do anything through hard work. (Source: Taiso Samurai Wiki)

name: Juri Mutou
description: The daughter of a very famous pianist who had to stop playing after giving birth to her. She believed she had no hope in the future due to a dark past - until she met Yuu. ~!When she was 16 years old, her piano teacher raped her. She told about it her mother, but she didn't believe her. Taking her daughter for granted and hating her for losing her dream - piano - caused Juri's hatred for her. !~

name: Kalcion Lenbird
mediaTitles: Charming the Duke of the North
searchTerms: Charming the Duke of the North

name: Kanako Miyamae
description: __Height:__ 173 cm She is a second year high school transfer student to the prestigious Catholic girls' school Ame no Kisaki, which both her parents attended. Kanako's father was a teacher there, and her mother a student; when they fell in love, they got married quite soon after they left school. Kanako was born not too long after that. She made a decision to come to Ame no Kisaki based on her parents finding happiness together, and she in turn wanted to find her fated one. However, not all is c

name: Kasumi Tomine
description: Kasumi Tomine is the most energetic of the group. She views the Alien Party as a fun activity. She's well mannered, a great skater, and seems to be able to do anything that she sets her mind to. She enthusiastically approaches every task and still takes time to enjoy life around her. She's had a wide variety of experiences since she was small. When handling situations, she draws on the skills she's developed through her experiences. She's the genius type.

name: Kotori Otonashi
description: **Height:** 159 cm The secretary of 765 Production, Kotori is open-minded and smart, but also sometimes shy. Due to her position in the agency, at slow hours she can often doze off or start to daydream about outrageous things. She also spends much of her free time during workdays browsing 2chan, and because of this she is often thought of as being a pervert. Despite not being an idol herself, Kotori loves to sing.
